Kiss (Benefits): First Clear Master: +30/50/75% gold on first clear (Normal/Heroic/Mythic); Challenge Obsession: +40% materials (deathless), +30% fame (speed), +25% gold (full party); Guild Achievement Unlocked: +15 morale to party on completion
